expectations.text: Uses google-genai Python package (not deprecated google-generativeai)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'pip install google-generativeai' and 'import google.generativeai as genai' — this is the older deprecated package, not the current google-genai SDK

expectations.text: Strips base64 data URI prefix before sending to API
Uses async def endpoints with proper FastAPI patterns
expectations.evidence: async def translate endpoint with Pydantic BaseModel

expectations.text: Includes error handling with appropriate HTTP error responses
expectations.evidence: Only catches generic Exception -> 500. No input validation, no 400 for bad requests, no startup key validation
